simple-csv-processing.label: Pwosesis Senp CSV
simple-csv-processing.summary: Sèvi ak modil csv la pou li ranje ki separe pa virg, jwenn valè yo pa non kolòn, epi netwaye done senp pandan w ap trete ranje yo an sekirite.

sketch1.title: Netwaye valè ki soti nan ranje CSV yo

ci_print_clean_names.title: Enprime non ki netwaye yo soti nan yon fichye CSV.

ci_sum_valid_scores.title: Sime valè valab yo nan CSV la.

sc-import-csv.title: Poukisa enpòte csv?
sc-import-csv.prompt: Poukisa ou ekri `import csv` anvan ou itilize `csv.DictReader`?

help.concept: `DictReader` Se yon pati nan modil estanda Python `csv` la, kidonk fòk ou enpòte modil la anvan ou ka itilize `csv.DictReader`.
help.hint_1: Chèche opsyon ki di kòd la ap fè zouti CSV yo disponib nan yon modil.
help.hint_2: San enpòtasyon an, Python pa konnen sa `csv` refere a.

options.a: Li fè modil `csv` la disponib pou ou ka itilize `csv.DictReader`.
options.b: Li netwaye espas otomatikman nan chak valè CSV.
options.c: Li konvèti chak valè CSV an yon antye.
options.d: Li kreye yon nouvo fichye CSV si youn pa egziste.

sc-dictreader-row-type.title: Kisa DictReader pwodui?
sc-dictreader-row-type.prompt: Lè w ap fè yon bouk atravè `csv.DictReader(file)`, ki sa chak `row` sanble plis?
sc-dictreader-row-type.hint: Panse sou jwenn aksè a valè yo ak non kolòn tankou `row["name"]`.

help.concept: `csv.DictReader` li itilize ranje antèt la kòm kle, konsa chak ranje konpòte l tankou yon diksyonè ki mape non kolòn yo ak valè tèks.
help.hint_1: Si ou ka itilize non yon kolòn andedan kwochè, ranje a baze sou kle.
help.hint_2: Etikèt antèt yo vin tounen kle tankou `name` ak `score`.

options.a: Yon diksyonè ki map non kolòn yo ak valè yo
options.b: Yon antye sèl nan ranje a
options.d: Yon fonksyon ki netwaye ranje a

mc-clean-score-steps.title: Netwaye yon valè nòt
mc-clean-score-steps.prompt: Yon ranje CSV gen `row["score"] == " 12 "`. Ki etap ki prepare l kòrèkteman pou matematik? Chwazi tout sa ki aplike.
mc-clean-score-steps.hint: Ou bezwen yon nimewo, pa tèks ki gen espas ant lèt yo.

help.concept: Valè CSV yo li kòm chèn. Pou itilize yon chan nimerik nan kalkil, retire espas sipèflou si sa nesesè epi konvèti tèks ki netwaye a an yon antye.
help.hint_1: Yon sèl etap kòrèk retire espas ki antoure yo, epi yon lòt konvèti tèks la an nimewo.
help.hint_2: Metòd tankou `.strip()` netwaye tèks la, pandan ke `int(...)` chanje tip la.

options.a: Sèvi ak `.strip()` sou tèks nòt la.
options.b: Sèvi ak `int(...)` sou tèks nòt mizik ki netwaye a.
options.c: Kite l kòm tèks epi ajoute 1 dirèkteman
options.d: Sèvi ak `dict(row)` pou konvèti nòt la an yon nimewo.

mc-good-csv-processing.title: Modèl itil pou trete CSV
mc-good-csv-processing.prompt: Ki fragman kòd sa yo ki bon modèl pou debutan nan pwosesis senp CSV? Chwazi tout sa ki aplike.
mc-good-csv-processing.hint: Chèche modèl ki itilize modil csv la epi ki bay non kolòn yo klèman.

help.concept: Bon pwosesis CSV pou debutan itilize`import csv`, `csv.DictReader`, ak aksè klè pa non antèt. Enprime `dict(row)` itil tou pou enspekte yon ranje an sekirite.
help.hint_1: Youn nan opsyon kòrèk yo li ranje yo ak `csv.DictReader`, epi yon lòt enprime yon diksyonè ranje konplè pou enspeksyon.
help.hint_2: Evite chwa ki pretann valè CSV yo vin nimewo otomatikman oswa ki pa enpòte modil la.

options.b: `print(dict(row))` anndan yon bouk pou enspekte chak ranje
options.c: Itilize `row["score"]` pou jwenn aksè a yon kolòn ki gen non
options.d: Sipoze `row["score"]` se deja yon antye san konvèsyon

dr-read-csv-order.title: Kòmande etap lekti CSV yo
dr-read-csv-order.prompt: Mete etap sa yo nan lòd kòrèk pou li yon fichye CSV ak`DictReader`, epi enprime yon kolòn.
dr-read-csv-order.hint: Kòmanse pa mete zouti CSV yo disponib, apre sa louvri fichye a, epi kreye lektè a.

help.concept: Yon script ki li CSV anjeneral swiv yon sekans: enpòte modil la, louvri fichye a, kreye yon `DictReader`, fè yon bouk sou ranje yo, epi jwenn valè yo pa non kolòn.
help.hint_1: Boukl la fèt apre lektè a fin kreye.
help.hint_2: Aksè a `row["name"]` dwe fèt andedan bouk la, apre yon ranje egziste.

dr-clean-row-order.title: Kòmande etap netwayaj ranje yo
dr-clean-row-order.prompt: Mete aksyon sa yo nan lòd kote yo netwaye yon nòt epi itilize li nan matematik.
dr-clean-row-order.hint: Jwenn tèks la an premye, netwaye li, konvèti li, epi kalkile.

help.concept: Lè w ap netwaye done nimerik nan yon fichye CSV, premye li valè tèks la, apre sa retire espas yo, konvèti l an nimerik`int`, epi sèlman apre sa sèvi avè l nan aritmetik.
help.hint_1: Arithmetik ta dwe fèt apre konvèsyon an nan yon antye.
help.hint_2: `.strip()` Li dwe vini anvan `int(...)`, paske li netwaye tèks ke `int` pral li.

tokens.t2: Konvèti tèks ki netwaye a avèk `int(...)`

fb-dictreader-name.title: Chwazi zouti lektè CSV la
fb-dictreader-name.prompt: Konplete kòd la pou ranje yo ka jwenn pa non kolòn.
fb-dictreader-name.hint: Sèvi ak zouti CSV ki kreye ranje tankou yon diksyonè.

help.concept: `csv.the missing term` li ranje antèt la epi li bay chak ranje ki vin apre kòm yon objè ki sanble ak yon diksyonè, kote kle yo se non kolòn yo.
help.hint_1: Valè ki manke a se non klas lektè a apre "`csv.`".
help.hint_2: Se pa `reader` ni `split`; se èd CSV ki kòmanse ak `Dict`.

fb-strip-choice.title: Chwazi metòd netwayaj la
fb-strip-choice.prompt: Ranpli metòd ki manke a pou retire espas ki antoure yon valè CSV.
fb-strip-choice.hint: Metòd sa a pou chèn retire espas nan tou de bout yo.

help.concept: `.the missing term()` retire espas vid nan kòmansman ak nan fen yon chèn, sa ki itil anvan konvèti valè tèks CSV yo.
help.hint_1: Metòd ki manke a rele sou yon chèn tankou `row["name"]`.
help.hint_2: Se metòd la ki transfòme `" Ava "` an `"Ava"`.

ci-print-clean-names.title: Enprime non ki netwaye yo soti nan yon fichye CSV
ci-print-clean-names.prompt:
Li`students.csv`
ak`csv.DictReader`
, netwaye chak non pandan w ap fè yon bouk sou liy yo, epi enprime non ki netwaye yo.

Sòti ou a dwe egzakteman:
`Ava`

`Ben`
.
ci-print-clean-names.hint: Li kòd la oswa kesyon an ak anpil atansyon epi chwazi opsyon ki kreye konpòtman egzak demann lan mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè sa a se pwogresif: kòd demaraj la se yon eta pwojè ki estab plis yon nouvo travay pou konplete.
help.hint_1: Pa efase kòd ki deja ap mache nan etap anvan an; ajoute nouvo konpòtman ki mande nan etap sa a.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwogram nan epi konpare sòti a ak egzanp ki atann lan anvan ou tcheke repons ou.

ci-print-clean-names.starterCode:
import csv

with open("students.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        # print the cleaned name
        pass
ci-print-clean-names.solutionCode:
import csv

with open("students.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        print(row["name"].strip())

0.message: Retire espas anvan chak non CSV anvan ou enprime li.

ci-sum-valid-scores.title: Sime valè ki valab yo nan CSV la.
ci-sum-valid-scores.prompt:
Li `scores.csv`, netwaye chak 'score', eseye konvèti li an antye, epi ajoute sèlman nimewo ki valab yo nan `total`. Enprime `total` apre bouk la.

Sòti ou a dwe egzakteman:
`16`.
ci-sum-valid-scores.hint: Li kòd la oswa kesyon an ak anpil atansyon epi chwazi opsyon ki kreye konpòtman egzak demann lan mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè sa a se pwogresif: kòd demaraj la se yon eta pwojè ki estab plis yon nouvo travay pou konplete.
help.hint_1: Pa efase kòd ki ap fonksyone nan etap anvan an; ajoute nouvo konpòtman ki mande nan etap sa a.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwogram nan epi konpare rezilta a ak egzanp ki atann lan anvan ou tcheke repons ou.

1.message: Konvèti tèks nòt la ak int().

ci-write-summary-file.title: Ekri yon fichye rezime CSV
ci-write-summary-file.prompt:
Bati yon rapò kout apati de`scores.csv`
. Pandan w ap fè bouk la, mete ajou`valid_rows`
ak`total_score`
pou ranje ki gen nòt antye ki valab, apre sa ekri rezilta sa yo nan`summary.txt`
epi enprime kontni fichye a.

Sòti w la dwe egzakteman:
`valid_rows: 2`

`total_score: 16`
.
ci-write-summary-file.hint: Li kòd la oswa kesyon an ak anpil atansyon epi chwazi opsyon ki kreye konpòtman egzak demann lan mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè sa a se pwogresif: kòd demaraj la se yon eta pwojè ki estab plis yon nouvo travay pou konplete.
help.hint_1: Pa efase kòd ki ap mache nan etap anvan an; ajoute nouvo konpòtman ki mande nan etap sa a.
help.hint_2: Kouri pwogram nan epi konpare sòti a ak egzanp ki atann lan anvan ou tcheke repons ou.

ci-write-summary-file.starterCode:
import csv

valid_rows = 0
total_score = 0

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        # update valid_rows and total_score for rows with valid integer scores
        pass

# write summary.txt, then print its contents
ci-write-summary-file.solutionCode:
import csv

valid_rows = 0
total_score = 0

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        try:
            score = int(row["score"].strip())
            valid_rows += 1
            total_score += score
        except ValueError:
            pass

with open("summary.txt", "w") as file:
    file.write(f"valid_rows: {valid_rows}\n")
    file.write(f"total_score: {total_score}\n")

with open("summary.txt") as file:
    print(file.read(), end="")

0.message: Itiliztry/except pou valè nòt ki pa valab.

try-simple-csv-processing-checkpoint.hint: Enpòte `csv`, kreye `csv.DictReader(file)`, epi itilize premye ranje a.

help.concept: Kat sa a kòmanse leson an ak yon fichye CSV reyèl olye de yon ranje kòd fiks.
help.hint_1: Itiliz`import csv` ak `with open("scores.csv") as file:`.
help.hint_2: Kreye `reader = csv.DictReader(file)`, jwenn premye ranje a, epi enprime `row["name"]` ak `row["score"]`.

try-simple-csv-processing-checkpoint.starterCode:
import csv

# Open scores.csv with csv.DictReader.
# Print the first row name, then the first row score.
try-simple-csv-processing-checkpoint.solutionCode:

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    row = next(reader)
    print(row["name"])
    print(row["score"])

try-simple-csv-processing-sketch1.starterCode:
import csv

# Open scores.csv with csv.DictReader.
# Loop through the rows and print each one as name: score.
try-simple-csv-processing-sketch1.solutionCode:
import csv

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        print(f'{row["name"]}: {row["score"]}')

try-simple-csv-processing-sketch2.prompt: Ouvri `scores.csv` ak `csv.DictReader`, konvèti chak nòt an antye, ajoute nòt yo nan `total`, epi enprime `total`.

help.hint_1: Kòmanse ak `total = 0`, epi fè yon bouk atravè `csv.DictReader(file)`.

try-simple-csv-processing-sketch2.starterCode:
import csv

total = 0

# Open scores.csv with csv.DictReader.
# Convert each score to int, add it into total, and print total.
try-simple-csv-processing-sketch2.solutionCode:
import csv

total = 0

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        total += int(row["score"])

print(total)

3.message: Ajoute chak nòt nimerik nan total la.

csv-dictreader-basics.title: Li liy CSV kòm diksyonè
csv-dictreader-basics.bodyMarkdown:
The `csv` module helps Python read comma-separated data without you splitting each line by hand. A very useful tool is `csv.DictReader`, which turns each row into a dictionary.

```python
import csv

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        print(row["name"], row["score"])
```

If `scores.csv` contains:

```text
name,score
Ava,9
Ben,7
```

the output is:

```text
Ava 9
Ben 7
```

Step by step:

- `import csv` makes the standard library CSV tools available.
- `open("scores.csv")` opens the file for reading.
- `csv.DictReader(file)` reads the header row first.
- Each later row becomes a dictionary like `{"name": "Ava", "score": "9"}`.
- `row["name"]` gets the value from the `name` column.

Worked example: if a row is `Cara,12`, then `row["name"]` is `"Cara"` and `row["score"]` is `"12"`.

csv-cleaning-values.title: Netwaye valè ki soti nan ranje CSV yo
csv-cleaning-values.bodyMarkdown:
CSV data often has extra spaces or values stored as text. Cleaning means fixing those values before using them.

```python
import csv

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        name = row["name"].strip()
        score = int(row["score"].strip())
        print(name, score + 1)
```

Suppose the file contains:

```text
name,score
 Ava , 9
Ben, 7
```

Line by line:

- `row["name"]` gets the text from the `name` column.
- `.strip()` removes spaces around the text.
- `row["score"]` is still text, not a number.
- `int(...)` converts that cleaned text into an integer.
- `print(name, score + 1)` prints the cleaned name and a changed numeric value.

Worked example:

- For the first row, `row["name"]` is `" Ava "`, so `strip()` makes it `"Ava"`.
- `row["score"]` is `" 9"`, so after cleaning and converting it becomes `9`.

csv-safe-processing.title: Sote ranje move an sekirite
csv-safe-processing.bodyMarkdown:
Sometimes a CSV file has messy data. A score might be missing or contain text like `oops`. You can use `try` and `except` to skip rows that cannot be converted.

```python
import csv

with open("scores.csv") as file:
    reader = csv.DictReader(file)
    for row in reader:
        try:
            name = row["name"].strip()
            score = int(row["score"].strip())
            print(name, score)
        except ValueError:
            print("skipping bad score")
```

If the file contains:

```text
name,score
Ava,9
Ben,oops
Cara,12
```

then the program prints:

```text
Ava 9
skipping bad score
Cara 12
```

What happens here:

- Python reads one row at a time.
- `int(...)` works for `"9"` and `"12"`.
- `int("oops")` raises a `ValueError`.
- The `except ValueError:` block handles that problem so the program keeps going.
